title: vicia narbonensis subsp. galilaea
intro: Vicia narbonensis subsp. galilaea is a subspecies of the Mediterranean grass pea, a type of vetch that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vicia narbonensis subsp. galilaea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves, roots, and seeds, which can be dried, crushed, or infused in water to create teas, tinctures, or capsules for medicinal use.
